chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.782 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on office objection at A 2.For hg of main case 3.For hg of M.A. No.9990/2024 06.11.2024. Mr. Waqar Ali Abbasi, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Naeem Memon, advocate for respondent No. 4. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. Prosecutor General. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would be satisfied if it is ordered that the applicant may be arrested only when some cogent evidence presentable in the Court is collected against him in the investigation. Learned counsel for respondent No. 4 and learned APG have no objection. Accordingly, this application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HANIF
